mapper.insert: INSERT INTO thesis_application(student_id, topic_id, team_id, apply_type, application_status, is_locked, apply_time, reserve_until, remark) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{topicId}, #{teamId}, #{applyType}, #{applicationStatus}, #{isLocked}, #{applyTime}, #{reserveUntil}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT ta.application_id, ta.student_id, ta.topic_id, ta.team_id, ta.apply_type, ta.application_status, ta.is_locked, ta.apply_time, ta.review_time, ta.reviewer_id, ta.remark FROM thesis_application ta JOIN topic_library tl ON ta.topic_id = tl.topic_id WHERE tl.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.application_status = 1

SELECT ta.application_id, ta.student_id, s.real_name AS studentName, s.account AS studentAccount, ta.topic_id, tl.topic_name AS topicName, ta.team_id, ta.apply_type, ta.application_status, ta.apply_time, ta.remark FROM thesis_application ta JOIN topic_library tl ON ta.topic_id = tl.topic_id LEFT JOIN student_account s ON ta.student_id = s.student_id WHERE tl.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.application_status = 2 ORDER BY ta.apply_time DESC

SELECT ta.application_id, ta.student_id, s.real_name AS studentName, s.account AS studentAccount, ta.topic_id, tl.topic_name AS topicName, ta.team_id, ta.apply_type, ta.application_status, ta.apply_time, ta.review_time, ta.remark FROM thesis_application ta JOIN topic_library tl ON ta.topic_id = tl.topic_id LEFT JOIN student_account s ON ta.student_id = s.student_id WHERE tl.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.application_status IN (0, 3) ORDER BY ta.review_time DESC

SELECT ta.application_id, ta.student_id, ta.topic_id, ta.team_id, ta.apply_type, ta.application_status, ta.is_locked, ta.apply_time, ta.review_time, ta.reviewer_id, ta.remark FROM thesis_application ta JOIN topic_library tl ON ta.topic_id = tl.topic_id WHERE tl.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.application_status != 1

SELECT application_id, student_id, topic_id, team_id, apply_type, application_status, is_locked, apply_time, review_time, reviewer_id, remark, reserve_until FROM thesis_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND application_status = #{status} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND application_status IN (1, 2, 3)
mapper.update: UPDATE thesis_application SET application_status = 0, remark = '预占30分钟超时自动释放' WHERE application_status = 1 AND reserve_until IS NOT NULL AND reserve_until < NOW()
UPDATE thesis_application SET student_id = #{newStudentId}, reserve_until = #{reserveUntil} WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND student_id = -1 AND application_status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application
AND application_status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE thesis_application SET application_status = 3, review_time = NOW(), reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, remark = #{remark} WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND application_status = 2

UPDATE thesis_application SET topic_id = #{topicId}, team_id = #{teamId}, apply_type = #{applyType}, application_status = #{applicationStatus}, is_locked = #{isLocked}, apply_time = #{applyTime}, reserve_until = #{reserveUntil}, remark = NULL WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_account) AS studentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher_account) AS teacherCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic_library) AS topicCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_info) AS teamCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application WHERE application_status = 1) AS pendingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application WHERE application_status = 3) AS confirmedCount
